data.body: Consideration (adversarial review): [Integration] After --no-commit merge, MERGE_HEAD is present when pre-commit hooks fire. This triggers the merge-bypass path in both gates (ms_is_merge_in_progress returns true). The gates filter staged files to worktree-only (session-side) files. If all staged files are incoming-only, gates exit 0 without checking attestation. Verify --attest writes to the correct artifacts dir (session's, not worktree's) and that the gate path (merge-bypass vs full) is explicitly tested.
